title: Equality before law
description: The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.

title: Freedom of Speech and Expression
description: All citizens shall have the right to freedom of speech and expression.

title: Protection of Life and Personal Liberty
description: No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.

title: Remedies for enforcement of rights
description: The right to move the Supreme Court by appropriate proceedings for the enforcement of the rights conferred by this Part is guaranteed.

title: Uniform Civil Code for the citizens
description: The State shall endeavour to secure for the citizens a uniform civil code throughout the territory of India.

title: Equal justice and free legal aid
description: The State shall secure that the operation of the legal system promotes justice, on a basis of equal opportunity, and shall, in particular, provide free legal aid...
